message:
style: rustfmt + clippy compliance across wa-core modules

Apply cargo fmt and clippy fixes across 19 files. Key patterns:

Formatting:
- Reflow long .map_err() closures into block form for readability
- Break long assert_eq!() calls onto multiple lines
- Restructure multi-line method chains per rustfmt norms
- Fix struct variant formatting (single-field variants on one line)
- Reflow import groups alphabetically

Clippy:
- Replace .filter_map(|r| r.ok()) with .filter_map(Result::ok)
- Use .map_or() instead of .map().unwrap_or()
- Use is_ok_and() instead of .map_or(false, ...)

Affected modules: backup, browser (bootstrap, mod, openai_device),
cass, chaos, crash, degradation, diagnostic, events, export, ingest,
output/renderers, patterns, runtime, storage, tailer, wait, and
quickfix_tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
